content.body:
- reindex --landmarks: runs ComputeLandmarks after index rebuild
- doctor --landmarks: replaces stub with real landmark display
- bootstrap: auto-runs ComputeLandmarks + WriteTagGraph post-scan
  when doc count >= MinDocsForLandmarks (100)
- root: registers recallCmd and tourCmd

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
content.subject: feat(cmd): wire landmarks into reindex, doctor, bootstrap, and root
